name: Strata Critical Medical, Inc.
business: Strata Critical Medical provides time-critical logistics and clinical services to the U.S. healthcare industry, focusing on organ transplant. It offers air and ground logistics, organ placement, surgical organ recovery, normothermic regional perfusion, and perfusion staffing for transplant centers, organ procurement organizations, and hospitals.

exposures.sentence: Strata's core services include air and ground logistics, organ placement, surgical organ recovery, normothermic regional perfusion and preservation for the transplant industry, as well as perfusion staffing and equipment solutions for cardiovascular surgery centers, offered under the Trinity Medical Solutions (Trinity) and Keystone Perfusion Services LLC (Keystone) brands.
Clinical segment ... includes ... Preservation - Operation of devices utilized to preserve organs prior to being transplanted into a recipient.

catalysts.event: Entry into asset-based revolving credit facility providing up to $30 million, with accordion feature for additional $20 million
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we entered into a revolving credit facility (the ABL Facility) backed by our accounts receivable, that provides additional liquidity and financial flexibility.
